sentences.text: The bright red car moves quickly along the highway.
It has four strong wheels and shiny windows.
My father drives carefully through traffic.
We wear seat belts before starting the journey.
The car stops when the signal turns red.
The engine makes a soft humming sound.
Traveling by car feels comfortable and safe.
The yellow school bus arrives early every morning.
Children wait patiently at the bus stop.
The driver greets everyone with a smile.
The bus moves slowly through busy streets.
Students talk quietly while sitting in rows.
The bus stops safely near the school gate.
The journey to school feels cheerful and safe.
The long train travels across cities and towns.
It runs smoothly on strong metal tracks.
Passengers buy tickets before boarding the train.
The whistle blows loudly at the station.
People wave goodbye as the train departs.
The train moves quickly through tunnels and bridges.
Traveling by train is fast and exciting.
The airplane flies high above the clouds.
Its wide wings help it stay balanced.
Passengers fasten their seat belts before takeoff.
The pilot controls the plane carefully.
The engines roar loudly during departure.
The plane lands smoothly on the runway.
Flying to another city feels amazing.
I ride my bicycle every evening after school.
The bicycle has two strong wheels.
I wear a helmet to stay safe.
I pedal faster when the road is clear.
The wind touches my face gently.
I stop before crossing the street.
Riding a bicycle keeps me active and healthy.
The wooden boat floats peacefully on the river.
The water moves gently under the boat.
People wear life jackets for safety.
The boat travels slowly toward the shore.
The cool breeze feels refreshing.
Fishermen use boats to catch fish.
Boat rides feel calm and relaxing.
The traffic signal controls vehicles at busy roads.
Red light means vehicles must stop immediately.
Green light allows cars to move forward.
Yellow light warns drivers to slow down.
Drivers follow signals to avoid accidents.
Pedestrians cross the road carefully.
Traffic rules keep everyone safe.
The motorcycle moves quickly along the highway.
It has two wheels and a powerful engine.
The rider wears a helmet for protection.
The engine makes a loud roaring sound.
The motorcycle stops when the brakes are pressed.
It travels faster than many vehicles.
Motorcycles are popular for short journeys.
Airports are busy places filled with travelers.
Passengers check their tickets before boarding.
Security officers inspect luggage carefully.
Planes take off after receiving permission.
Families wait patiently near the gates.
Announcements are made over loudspeakers.
Traveling by air saves time.
Our family goes on a trip during holidays.
We pack our bags carefully before leaving.
We travel by car to a beautiful city.
We visit parks, museums, and markets.
We take photos to remember the journey.
We eat local food during the trip.
Family trips create happy memories.
